name: QRadar Audit: Unusual Number of Offenses Created
notes: This rule triggers when the number of offenses created is either higher or lower by a difference of 40% over a period of 24 hours. The difference can be tuned to match desired threshold.
conditions_text: when the average value (per interval) of SUM(EventCount) over the last 2 hours is at least 40% different from the average value (per interval) of the same property over the last 24 hours
thresholds: when the average value (per interval) of SUM(EventCount) over the last 2 hours is at least 40% different from the average value (per interval) of the same property over the last 24 hours
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Unusual Number of Offenses Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the average value (per interval) of SUM(EventCount) over the last 2 hours is at least 40% different from the average value (per interval) of the same property over the last 24 hours
RED_list: Event name: Event: QRadar Audit: Unusual Number of Offenses Created
Event description: This Event was generated by Anomaly Detection (AD) rule 'QRadar Audit: Unusual Number of Offenses Created'.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
